verses.text: Thong huang sungah Jeremiah a kikhumcip laitak mahin Topa in a nihveina hopih a
“Leitung bawlin a kipsak Topa, a min Topa a kici Topa in kong genin-ah
Kei nong sap leh kong dawngkik ding a, na theih ngei nailoh a ki-imcip thu lianpite kong gen ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh galte' kan tawhna leh galkidona hangin a kisusiagawp ding hih khuapi sunga innte leh Judah kumpite' innte tawh kisai-in, Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah

Ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna tawh ka thahlup ding misi luangte tawh a kidimsak dingin Khaldea mite in a hong sim ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuapi sunga a om mite' gitlohna hangin hih khuapi panin ka mai ka seel hi
Ahih hangin tu-in, keimah in hih khuapi ka damsak ding a, cidamin ka omsak ding hi. A mite cidamsakin hauhna leh lungmuan'na a kicing ka lak ding hi
Judah mite leh Israel mite ka hausak kik ding a, a nidanga a om ngei bangun ka omsak kik ding hi
Kei tungah hong bawl uh mawhna khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak ding a, kei tungah a hong mawhnate uh leh a hong langpan'na khempeuhte uh ka maisak ding hi
Jerusalem khuapi pen kei-a' dingin lungdamna, minphatna, leh minthan'na ahi hi. A sunga om mite tungah hoihna leh hauhna ka tun'sakna thu a za minam dangte lau-in a ling ding uh hi

“ Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in, ‘Hih munah mihing, ganhing omloin mundai suak hi,’ ci-in na gen uh mah bangin Judah gam khuapite leh Jerusalem khua kongzingte awng a, mihing ganhing kuamah a teng kei hi

Ahih hangin lungdamna aw leh kipahna awte, zinei thakte leh mothakte' awte kiza kik ding hi. Topa' biakinn-ah mite hong pai-in lungdam kohna-in: ‘Vanglian Topa' tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi,’ ci-in a lasakna awte uh a kiza kik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, a masa-a mah bangin hih gam ka hausak kik ding hi
“Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, mihing ganhing omloin mun awng ahi mun leh a khuapi khempeuhte-ah tuu-cingte in tuu cingin a ten'theihna ding mun hong om ding hi

Mualtunga khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite leh leitaw lam Negeb gama khuapite, Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot leh Judah gam khuapite-ah, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tuucingte in a tuute uh a phazah a sim ding uh hi
“En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah: Israel mite leh Judah mite tungah ka khapsa thu ka tangtun'sak hun hong tung ding hi
Tua hun ciangin David' suan lak panin kumpi dingin a diktat mi khat ka khangsak ding a, amah in gam sungah thuman tawh thu hong khen ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Judah mite kihonkhia ding a, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teng ding uh hi. Amah a kisapna dingin a min ‘ Topa, Eite' Diktan'na,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah: Israel mite' kumpi dingin David' suan sung panin mi kitasam ngeilo ding hi
Levi minam lak panin zong meihal biaknate, an tawh biakna leh biakpiaknate a pia tawntung dingin ka mai-ah a ding ding siampi kitasam ngeilo ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kei hong hopih a
“ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Sun hun leh zan hun a manmanin a hong tun'loh theihna dingin sun tawh ka thuciamna leh zan tawh ka thuciamna na siatsakzawh ciang bekin
keimah leh ka nasempa David tawh ka thuciamna kisia pan ding a, amah in a kumpi tokhom luah ding tapa neiloin, ka na a sem ding siampi Levi minamte tawh ka thuciamna zong a kisia hi pan ding hi
Vana aksite kisim zoloin, tuipi-a sehnelte a kiteh zawhloh bangin keimah in ka nasempa David' suanlekhakte ahi a, siampi Levi minamte ahi zongin ka pungsak den ding hi,” hong ci hi
Topa in kei hong hopih a

“Hih mite in, Topa in a teelsa Israel leh Judah minamte gel a nusia ta hi, ci-in a gen uh thei khalo na hi hiam? Tua bangin amaute in ka mite simmawh uh a, amau' muhna-ah minam khatin a sim nawn kei uh hi
Topa in kong genin-ah: Sun leh zan tawh ka thuciamna ahi a, vantung leh leitung ngeina kipte ahi zongin a kipsak khin nailo hi leng

Jakob leh ka nasempa David' suante ka nial ding a, Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob' suante a uk dingin amaute' lakah mi khat zong a teello ding mah ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang hiloin amaute ka hausak kik ding a, ka hehpih ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
